task: Find the current NFL standings for the AFC East division on NFL.com and go to the page on which team is in first place.
final_result_response:
I have successfully completed the task:

1. **Navigated to NFL.com standings page** at https://www.nfl.com/standings/
2. **Found the AFC East division standings** for the 2025 regular season:
   - **1st: New England Patriots** — 14-3-0 (PCT .824)
   - 2nd: Buffalo Bills — 12-5-0 (PCT .706)
   - 3rd: Miami Dolphins — 7-10-0 (PCT .412)
   - 4th: New York Jets — 3-14-0 (PCT .176)
3. **Clicked on the New England Patriots** (the first-place team) and am now on their team page at https://www.nfl.com/teams/new-england-patriots/, which confirms they are **1st in the AFC East with a 14-3-0 record**.
